1
Net revenue pulled back to $137.6K in Mar from $164.2K in Feb. YTD revenue at $465.8K.
2
3
4
Gross margin compressed to 21.3% in Mar as COGS rose to $108.3K while revenue declined.
EBITDA swung to -$16.1K in Mar from $11.6K in Feb, as COGS growth outpaced the OPEX savings.
Driven by lower salaries, OPEX improved to $45.4K in Mar from $55.3K in Feb, partially offsetting the revenue drop.
1
2
3
4
PRIVATE AND CONFIDENTIAL. DRAFT FOR DISCUSSION PURPOSES ONLY
5
Profit bridge (Mar'26)
EBITDA fell by ~$27.7K in Mar'26.
1
EBITDA decreased from $11.6K in Feb'26 to -$16.1K in Mar'26 (down ~$27.7K), due to lower Philippines revenue ($20.4K) and higher cost of Mental Wellbeing experts($12.3K)
PRIVATE AND CONFIDENTIAL. DRAFT FOR DISCUSSION PURPOSES ONLY
6
Revenue Breakdown
PRIVATE AND CONFIDENTIAL. DRAFT FOR DISCUSSION PURPOSES ONLY
7
Revenue breakdown - top clients based on billed revenue
Client billing remains concentrated, with the top 3 TaskUs accounts driving ~61% of FY26 YTD billed revenue.
TaskUs Las Pinas (HRY) continues as the largest billed client at $120.9K YTD.
LatAm clients provide geographic diversification, contributing $25.4K YTD.
"Total of Remaining" eased to $13.7K in Mar from $19.7K in Feb, signaling narrower client activity.

PRIVATE AND CONFIDENTIAL. DRAFT FOR DISCUSSION PURPOSES ONLY
8
Revenue breakdown - top clients based on collected revenue
Collected revenue was $123.2K in Mar, with FY26 YTD collections at $431.8K against $465.8K billed (92.7%).
Collections decreased from $147.2K in Feb to $123.2K in Mar, while cash conversion stayed roughly flat at ~90% of billed in both months, suggesting the drop is mainly from lower billed volume rather than weaker collections.
Top 3 accounts represent ~$285.2K or 66% of YTD collected revenue, underscoring concentration risk.

9
Receivables aging (as of February, 2026)
45.2% of receivables are current, while 39.2% (~$41.7K) are older than 3 months.
"Older" receivables at 39.2% of total, with Spiralytics, Inc. ($21.1K) making up the bulk.
Total receivables stand at $106.3K. Monitor aging mix as current share remains below 50%.

Disclaimer
The services and materials provided by Alehar are subject to Alehar's Standard Terms (a copy of which is available upon request) or such other agreement as may have been previously executed by Alehar. Alehar does not provide legal, accounting, or tax advice. The Client is responsible for obtaining independent advice concerning these matters. This advice may affect the guidance given by Alehar. Further, Alehar has made no undertaking to update these materials after the date hereof, notwithstanding that such information may become outdated or inaccurate.
The materials contained in this presentation are designed for the sole use by the board of directors or senior management of the Client and solely for the limited purposes described in the presentation. The materials shall not be copied or given to any person or entity other than the Client (“Third Party”) without the prior written consent of Alehar. These materials serve only as the focus for discussion; they are incomplete without the accompanying oral commentary and may not be relied on as a stand-alone document. Further, Third Parties may not, and it is unreasonable for any Third Party to, rely on these materials for any purpose whatsoever. To the fullest extent permitted by law (and except to the extent otherwise agreed in a signed writing by Alehar), Alehar shall have no liability whatsoever to any Third Party, and any Third Party hereby waives any rights and claims it may have at any time against Alehar with regard to the services, this presentation, or other materials, including the accuracy or completeness thereof. Receipt and review of this document shall be deemed agreement with and consideration for the foregoing.
Alehar does not provide fairness opinions or valuations of market transactions, and these materials should not be relied on or construed as such. Further, the financial evaluations, projected market and financial information, and conclusions contained in these materials are based upon standard valuation methodologies, are not definitive forecasts, and are not guaranteed by Alehar. Alehar has used public and/or confidential data and assumptions provided to Alehar by the Client. Alehar has not independently verified the data and assumptions used in these analyses. Changes in the underlying data or operating assumptions will clearly impact the analyses and conclusions.
